de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy

Class FocussedRuleApplicationManager

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.FocussedRuleApplicationManager
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    NewRuleListener, AutomatedRuleApplicationManager

    public class FocussedRuleApplicationManager
extends Object
implements AutomatedRuleApplicationManager
    A rule app manager that ensures that rules are only applied to a certain subterm within the proof (within a goal). The real work is delegated to a second manager (delegate pattern), this class only filters rule applications

    • Field Summary

        Clear existing caches of applicable rules

      • clone

        public Object clone()
        Overrides:
        clone in class Object

      • peekNext

        public RuleApp peekNext()
        Specified by:
        peekNext in interface AutomatedRuleApplicationManager
        Returns:
        the first applicable rule app, i.e. the least expensive element of the heap that is not obsolete and caches the result of this operation to save some time the next time the method nextAndCache() or next() is called. A call of next() empties the cache again.

      • next

        public RuleApp next()
        Specified by:
        next in interface AutomatedRuleApplicationManager
        Returns:
        the next rule that is supposed to be applied
